_phase_o3_act_draft_note: Phase O3-ACT-DRAFT pre-authoring (mirrors Phase O2-SUGGEST-DRAFT 2026-05-07 + Curator Sessions 1+2+3 ON-CHAIN ACTIVATION 2026-05-09). Bundle Merkle root locked at draft authoring time; operator_initiative_advancement.py enforces O3_ACT advancement criteria externally before this bundle is anchored. Curator-exclusive O3 gate is marketplace_curator_role_assigned: setCurator() role on VAPIDataMarketplaceListings.sol (0x78Df84Cc512EdCaC0e58a03e4852627E2F62E3bC, Phase 238 Step F reservation, Phase 238 Step H deploy 2026-05-09) MUST be assigned to this agent's address before O3 anchor. SECURITY NOTE: Curator was activated using MockKMSClient on testnet — mainnet O3_ACTING anchor requires AWS KMS HSM provisioning per wiki/runbooks/curator_mainnet_migration.md before this bundle is anchored on mainnet.

_o3_gates._mainnet_only_gate: kms_hsm_production_ready (AWS KMS HSM, NOT MockKMSClient — testnet anchor allowed with MockKMSClient per Sessions 1+2+3 precedent)

policies._note: Curator reads marketplace listings + reviews
Curator reads provenance DAG to verify anchor freshness
Curator reads event stream for listing creation triggers
Curator reads wiki briefs for tier rule reference
On-chain reads — AdjudicationRegistry.isRecorded() / VAPIDataMarketplaceListings reads — view only, zero gas

kms-sign on listing reviews — signatures attach to live verdicts. Resource unchanged from O2 (draft://listing_reviews/*); production lift is at the verdict consumer (skill:marketplace-listing-review now writes to lane://marketplace/** instead of draft://listing_reviews/*).

O3 ACTING LIFT: marketplace-listing-review graduates from draft://listing_reviews/* (O2) to lane://marketplace/** (live verdicts written to canonical marketplace lane). Authority-graded review verdicts become permanent.
Tier compliance check — preserved across O2/O3
Anchor freshness audit — preserved across O2/O3
IPFS metadata fetch — read-only HTTP GET, preserved across O2/O3

operator-notify (suspension recommendation) — channel preserved at O3 for cases where Curator sees a violation but operator-final review is preferred over autonomous suspension. Resource unchanged from O2 (draft://operator_notifications/*).

O3 ACTING NEW PERMIT: marketplace-listing-suspend — direct suspension authority via VAPIDataMarketplaceListings.suspendListing() (Phase 238 Step F setCurator() reservation; Phase 238 Step H deploy 0x78Df84Cc...). This is the headline O3 ACT authority for Curator. Wallet impact per suspension ~0.001 IOTX. Suspension is reversible via reinstateListing() (operator-only).
Curator does NOT pin to IPFS (write-side) — preserved across O2/O3; reserved for Sentry's provenance lane
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — pda-attestation-anchor reserved for Sentry
git-push FOREVER forbidden across all Operator agents (PR-merge-only path)
Curator does NOT commit code — review verdicts written to lane://marketplace/** at O3 ACTING; PRs remain Sentry/Guardian scope
endpoint:write FOREVER forbidden — Curator's write authority is constrained to specific tool: actions (kms-sign, marketplace-listing-suspend, operator-notify), NEVER raw HTTP endpoints
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — event-correlation reserved for Sentry
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — provenance-recording reserved for Sentry
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — audit-drafting reserved for Guardian
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — operational-diagnostic reserved for Guardian

Curator FOREVER forbidden from kms-sign on validation_record paths — tournament gate validation_records require Sentry+Guardian co-sign authority, NEVER Curator. This invariant is preserved across all phases including O3.
